title: YooHoo Martee Polar Bear 5In 61101 White
features: Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Trademarked coloured YooHoo eyes are unique to the popular design of each character
From the new animated children's series "YooHoo to the Rescue" on Netflix
description: Meet our gorgeous Martee the Polar Bear He is part of our much loved and best selling YooHoo range Martee is now featured on YooHoo to the Rescue A Netflix Original Series This is a fabulous series of magical missions in which a quick-witted YooHoo and his can-do crew travel the globe to help animals in need Our range of YooHoo's will charm you with their new vibrant colours soft bodies and bushy tails To achieve a unique crystalized effect the trademarked big and sparkly eyes have also been redesigned by our industry leading designers Made in a sitting position and crafted in luxurious plush Martee is a white Polar Bear with blue accent colours He will make a great playmate and is perfect for any playtime Martee's friends are also available as soft toys so you can collect them all
